calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Robert M. Sellards, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Betty N. Olsen.
Lana Olsen-Parke, Guardian ad Litem for plaintiff Betty N. Olsen, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Steven T. Olsen.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 20, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Copy of application & order for application
of guardian ad litem, file endorsed 09/08/10.............................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--30-Day Notice to Quit dated 6/7/10.......................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--3--Statutory Power of Attorney for Betty N. Olsen dated 6/18/09.............ID/EVID.
Exhibit--4--POS of 30-Day Notice to Quit dated 6/8/10................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--5--1 page letter from Dean P. Cimino to Patrick Miller
re: 338 Wilde Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134............................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Betty N. Olsen, and against defendant Steven T. Olsen as follows:

Holdover Damages - $4,020.00.
Costs - $306.00.

Total - $4,326.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Betty N. Olsen is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 338 Wilde Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
